requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (TS EN 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（TS EN 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（TS EN 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: Turkey's EU-aligned Ecodesign regulation (transposing Commission Regulation (EU) 2019/2020, Annex II) makes photobiological risk classification and technical documentation a legal obligation for regulated LED light sources and relevant luminaires placed on the Turkish market. TS EN 62471 (the Turkish adoption of EN 62471:2008 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems) is the referenced technical method commonly used to derive the risk group; IEC 62471-7:2023 adds LED/light-source-specific photobiological safety guidance that may be useful for technical assessment where accepted by the chosen conformity route. The mandatory obligation is the regulation, not either standard as a standalone legal rule. Risk groups range from RG0 (Exempt — no hazard) to RG3 (High risk). Blue light weighted radiance and irradiance limits define the group. RG2 and RG3 products carry usage restrictions and must be declared in the technical file.
summary.zh: 土耳其与欧盟对齐的生态设计法规（转化欧盟委员会法规（EU）2019/2020，附件 II）将光生物危险组别分类及技术文件记录作为进入土耳其市场的受管制 LED 光源及相关灯具的法律义务。TS EN 62471（EN 62471:2008 的土耳其采用版——灯和灯系统的光生物安全）是通常用于得出危险组别的引用技术方法；IEC 62471-7:2023 补充了面向 LED/光源的光生物安全指引，在所选合格评定路径接受时可用于技术评估。强制性义务来自该法规，而不是任何标准本身作为独立法律规则。危险组别从 RG0（豁免——无危害）至 RG3（高危险）。蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度限值决定组别。RG2 和 RG3 产品存在使用限制，须在技术文件中进行声明。
summary.zht: 土耳其與歐盟對齊的生態設計法規（轉化歐盟委員會法規（EU）2019/2020，附件 II）將光生物危險組別分類及技術文件記錄作為進入土耳其市場的受管制 LED 光源及相關燈具的法律義務。TS EN 62471（EN 62471:2008 的土耳其採用版——燈和燈系統的光生物安全）是通常用於得出危險組別的引用技術方法；IEC 62471-7:2023 補充了面向 LED/光源的光生物安全指引，在所選合格評定路徑接受時可用於技術評估。強制性義務來自該法規，而不是任何標準本身作為獨立法律規則。危險組別從 RG0（豁免——無危害）至 RG3（高危險）。藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度限值決定組別。RG2 和 RG3 產品存在使用限制，須在技術文件中進行聲明。

standards_or_laws: Turkey EU-aligned Ecodesign Regulation (transposing Commission Regulation (EU) 2019/2020 — Annex II: photobiological safety) — Ministry of Trade (T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı)
TS EN 62471 (Turkish adoption of EN 62471:2008) — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (harmonised standard for risk group classification) (TSE)
IEC 62471-7:2023 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems — Part 7: Light sources and luminaires primarily emitting visible radiation

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which is technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006 (the predecessor to the 2008 edition adopted by Turkey as TS EN 62471). GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market. Enforcement and testing obligations are less prescriptive for residential luminaires compared to the Turkish EU-aligned Ecodesign framework.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006（土耳其采用为 TS EN 62471 的 2008 年版本的前身）。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求。与土耳其欧盟对齐的生态设计框架相比，中国对居民灯具的执行及检测义务规定不够严格。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006（土耳其採用為 TS EN 62471 的 2008 年版本的前身）。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求。與土耳其歐盟對齊的生態設計框架相比，中國對居民燈具的執行及檢測義務規定不夠嚴格。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard)

gap.en: Turkey's EU-aligned Ecodesign regulation (Annex II) requires photobiological risk group classification and declaration for regulated light sources — this is not optional. TS EN 62471 is the referenced technical method commonly used to determine the risk group, and IEC 62471-7:2023 can provide LED/light-source-specific technical guidance, but the legal obligation is the regulation. CN GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and not routinely enforced for residential LED luminaires. Manufacturers producing for the Turkish market should document a defensible risk-group assessment, commonly by testing to TS EN 62471 and considering IEC 62471-7:2023 where relevant; RG2 luminaires must include warnings and usage instructions; RG3 products face significant market restrictions (typically limited to professional/industrial use with specialist training). Most general-purpose LED luminaires targeting RG0 or RG1 have no usage restrictions, but the classification must be formally documented in the technical file.
gap.zh: 土耳其与欧盟对齐的生态设计法规（附件 II）要求对受管制光源进行光生物危险组别分类及声明——此要求非可选。TS EN 62471 是通常用于确定危险组别的引用技术方法，IEC 62471-7:2023 可提供 LED/光源特定技术指引，但法律义务来自该法规。中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性标准，对居民 LED 灯具的日常执行力度有限。面向土耳其市场的制造商应记录可辩护的危险组别评估，通常通过 TS EN 62471 检测并在相关时考虑 IEC 62471-7:2023；RG2 灯具须附带警告及使用说明；RG3 产品面临重大市场限制（通常仅限于具备专业培训的专业/工业用途）。大多数面向 RG0 或 RG1 的通用 LED 灯具无使用限制，但分类结果须正式记录于技术文件中。
gap.zht: 土耳其與歐盟對齊的生態設計法規（附件 II）要求對受管制光源進行光生物危險組別分類及聲明——此要求非可選。TS EN 62471 是通常用於確定危險組別的引用技術方法，IEC 62471-7:2023 可提供 LED/光源特定技術指引，但法律義務來自該法規。中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性標準，對居民 LED 燈具的日常執行力度有限。面向土耳其市場的製造商應記錄可辯護的危險組別評估，通常通過 TS EN 62471 檢測並在相關時考慮 IEC 62471-7:2023；RG2 燈具須附帶警告及使用說明；RG3 產品面臨重大市場限制（通常僅限於具備專業培訓的專業/工業用途）。大多數面向 RG0 或 RG1 的通用 LED 燈具無使用限制，但分類結果須正式記錄於技術文件中。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — photobiological risk group declaration required under Turkey's EU-aligned Ecodesign regulation (transposing Reg (EU) 2019/2020 Annex II) for regulated light sources
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

source.publisher: T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı (Ministry of Trade of Türkiye)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological risk group classification is required for regulated LED products under Turkey's EU-aligned Ecodesign regulation (transposing Reg (EU) 2019/2020). TS EN 62471 (Turkish adoption of EN 62471:2008) is the referenced technical method commonly used to derive the classification, and IEC 62471-7:2023 may support LED/light-source-specific assessment; neither should be described as the standalone mandatory legal obligation. Chinese GB/T 20145-2006 testing may be useful as a reference, but Turkish technical documentation should show a classification aligned with the Turkish (EU-aligned) Ecodesign framework. Manufacturers should formally document the risk group in the technical file; RG2/RG3 products require additional labelling and usage warnings.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据土耳其与欧盟对齐的生态设计法规（转化法规（EU）2019/2020），受管制 LED 产品须进行光生物危险组别分类。TS EN 62471（EN 62471:2008 的土耳其采用版）是通常用于得出该分类的引用技术方法，IEC 62471-7:2023 可支持 LED/光源特定评估；二者均不应描述为独立的强制性法律义务。中国 GB/T 20145-2006 检测可作为参考，但土耳其技术文件应显示与土耳其（与欧盟对齐）生态设计框架一致的分类。制造商应在技术文件中正式记录危险组别；RG2/RG3 产品须附加标签及使用警告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據土耳其與歐盟對齊的生態設計法規（轉化法規（EU）2019/2020），受管制 LED 產品須進行光生物危險組別分類。TS EN 62471（EN 62471:2008 的土耳其採用版）是通常用於得出該分類的引用技術方法，IEC 62471-7:2023 可支持 LED/光源特定評估；二者均不應描述為獨立的強制性法律義務。中國 GB/T 20145-2006 檢測可作為參考，但土耳其技術文件應顯示與土耳其（與歐盟對齊）生態設計框架一致的分類。製造商應在技術文件中正式記錄危險組別；RG2/RG3 產品須附加標籤及使用警告。

requirement_topic.en: Blue Light Hazard Class on Turkish Product Label (EU-aligned Energy Labelling)
requirement_topic.zh: 土耳其产品标签上的蓝光危害等级（与欧盟对齐的能效标签）
requirement_topic.zht: 土耳其產品標籤上的藍光危害等級（與歐盟對齊的能效標籤）

summary.en: Turkey's EU-aligned energy-labelling regulation (transposing Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2019/2015, Annex VI) requires blue light hazard class information on labels for in-scope products. The class is derived from the photobiological risk assessment, commonly using TS EN 62471 risk groups as the technical basis. The label uses plain-language classes: RG0 = 'No risk', RG1 = 'Low risk', RG2 = 'Moderate risk'. Products in the RG2 or above category must display this class prominently. This labelling obligation applies to light sources and to luminaires containing regulated light sources placed on the Turkish market.
summary.zh: 土耳其与欧盟对齐的能效标签法规（转化欧盟委员会授权法规（EU）2019/2015，附件 VI）要求适用产品标签须包含蓝光危害等级信息。该等级来自光生物危险评估，通常以 TS EN 62471 危险组别作为技术基础。标签采用通俗语言：RG0 = "无危险"，RG1 = "低危险"，RG2 = "中等危险"。RG2 及以上等级的产品须在显著位置标注该等级。上述标签义务适用于光源及含受管制光源的灯具，所有进入土耳其市场的产品均须遵守。
summary.zht: 土耳其與歐盟對齊的能效標籤法規（轉化歐盟委員會授權法規（EU）2019/2015，附件 VI）要求適用產品標籤須包含藍光危害等級信息。該等級來自光生物危險評估，通常以 TS EN 62471 危險組別作為技術基礎。標籤採用通俗語言：RG0 = "無危險"，RG1 = "低危險"，RG2 = "中等危險"。RG2 及以上等級的產品須在顯著位置標註該等級。上述標籤義務適用於光源及含受管制光源的燈具，所有進入土耳其市場的產品均須遵守。

standards_or_laws: Turkey EU-aligned Energy Labelling Regulation (transposing Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2019/2015 — Annex VI: blue light hazard class labelling) — Ministry of Trade (T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı)

summary.en: China's Energy Label (China Energy Label, CEL) mandatory under GB 30255 (LED room luminaires energy efficiency) does not include a blue light hazard class. The Chinese labelling regime focuses on energy efficiency grades (Grade 1–3) and lumen output. There is no CN regulatory requirement to display photobiological risk group information on luminaire packaging equivalent to the Turkish EU-aligned energy-labelling regulation.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255（LED 室内照明产品能效要求）强制推行的中国能效标识（CEL）不包含蓝光危害等级。中国标签制度侧重能效等级（1–3 级）及光通量输出，无相当于土耳其与欧盟对齐能效标签法规的规定要求在灯具包装上显示光生物危险组别信息。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255（LED 室內照明產品能效要求）強制推行的中國能效標識（CEL）不包含藍光危害等級。中國標籤制度側重能效等級（1–3 級）及光通量輸出，無相當於土耳其與歐盟對齊能效標籤法規的規定要求在燈具包裝上顯示光生物危險組別信息。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR — no blue light class requirement)

gap.en: The Turkish blue light hazard class label has no direct CN counterpart — Chinese manufacturers producing to CN specifications will not have this label on their standard CN-market packaging. For Turkish export, the blue light hazard class required by the EU-aligned Turkish energy-labelling regulation must be added to product labels and packaging. This requires: (1) documenting a photobiological risk assessment, commonly using TS EN 62471 risk group testing; (2) updating label artwork to include the blue light class in the EU-aligned Turkish label layout per Annex VI; (3) ensuring the class is visible on any online product listings sold into Turkey (required by the energy labelling framework). This is an additional labelling compliance step beyond the core energy label A-G class.
gap.zh: 土耳其蓝光危害等级标签无直接对应的中国要求——按中国规格生产的制造商在其标准中国市场包装上不会附有该标签。出口土耳其时，须在产品标签和包装上添加与欧盟对齐的土耳其能效标签法规要求的蓝光危害等级。具体要求包括：（1）记录光生物危险评估，通常采用 TS EN 62471 危险组别检测；（2）根据附件 VI 的与欧盟对齐的土耳其标签布局，更新标签设计以包含蓝光等级；（3）确保销往土耳其的任何在线产品列表中该等级可见（能源标签框架要求）。这是核心能效标签 A-G 等级之外的额外标签合规步骤。
gap.zht: 土耳其藍光危害等級標籤無直接對應的中國要求——按中國規格生產的製造商在其標準中國市場包裝上不會附有該標籤。出口土耳其時，須在產品標籤和包裝上添加與歐盟對齊的土耳其能效標籤法規要求的藍光危害等級。具體要求包括：（1）記錄光生物危險評估，通常採用 TS EN 62471 危險組別檢測；（2）根據附件 VI 的與歐盟對齊的土耳其標籤布局，更新標籤設計以包含藍光等級；（3）確保銷往土耳其的任何在線產品列表中該等級可見（能源標籤框架要求）。這是核心能效標籤 A-G 等級之外的額外標籤合規步驟。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — blue light hazard class on label required under Turkey's EU-aligned energy-labelling regulation (transposing Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2019/2015 Annex VI)
mandatory_status.cn: Not required — China Energy Label (GB 30255) does not include a blue light hazard class

source.publisher: T.C. Ticaret Bakanlığı (Ministry of Trade of Türkiye)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Turkish blue light hazard class label is required by Turkey's EU-aligned energy-labelling regulation (transposing Delegated Reg (EU) 2019/2015 Annex VI) and has no Chinese regulatory equivalent. Chinese manufacturers should document the photobiological risk group, commonly using TS EN 62471 as the technical method, and add the plain-language blue light class to Turkish-market product labels and online listings. The mandatory obligation is the Turkish regulation; TS EN 62471 is the technical route for deriving the class.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考]土耳其蓝光危害等级标签依据土耳其与欧盟对齐的能效标签法规（转化授权法规（EU）2019/2015 附件 VI）为强制要求，无对应中国法规要求。中国制造商应记录光生物危险组别，通常采用 TS EN 62471 作为技术方法，并在土耳其市场产品标签及在线列表上添加通俗语言版蓝光等级。强制性义务来自土耳其法规；TS EN 62471 是用于得出等级的技术路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考]土耳其藍光危害等級標籤依據土耳其與歐盟對齊的能效標籤法規（轉化授權法規（EU）2019/2015 附件 VI）為強制要求，無對應中國法規要求。中國製造商應記錄光生物危險組別，通常採用 TS EN 62471 作為技術方法，並在土耳其市場產品標籤及在線列表上添加通俗語言版藍光等級。強制性義務來自土耳其法規；TS EN 62471 是用於得出等級的技術路徑。
